title: Zenith Bank To Conclude Holdco Arrangement Before End Of May … As Shareholders Get N3.50 Kobo Final Dividend - FinancialEDGE
description: Zenith Bank Plc, planned holding company arrangement will be concluded before the end of May 2024. The Group Managing Director / Chief Executive Officer of the bank, Dr Ebenezer Onyeagwu, disclosed this at the bank 33rd Annual General Meeting (AGM) in Lagos. Just as shareholders approved a final dividend of N3.50 kobo for the financial year
html:
Zenith Bank Plc, planned holding company arrangement will be concluded before the end of May 2024. The Group Managing Director / Chief Executive Officer of the bank, Dr Ebenezer Onyeagwu, disclosed this at the bank 33rd Annual General Meeting (AGM) in Lagos.

Just as shareholders approved a final dividend of N3.50 kobo for the financial year ended December 31, 2023. This brings the total dividend for the 2023 financial year to N4.00 per share, with a total value of N125.59 billion, which is the highest dividend payout by the bank.

Also shareholders approved all the items on the ordinary and special business agenda, which includes the bank capital raising plan through right issues and the increase in the bank issued shares capital among others.

Onyeagwu, who was responding to questions from shareholders concerning the future of the bank business, especially with the current recapitalization directives from the Central Bank Of Nigeria (CBN), he explained that the group plans to expand its reach following its restructuring into a holding company structure, adding new verticals to its businesses and pursuing growth in all chosen markets, locally and internationally.

While commenting on Dame Dr Adaora Umeoji, who will be taking over from him, he noted that he is confident in the bank’s trajectory under her leadership, because she has institutional memory of the bank and has been part of the winning team. Urging the board, shareholders, customers to extend the same level of support given to him to her. “It has been a remarkable journey, and I am immensely proud of what we have accomplished together”.

Despite the challenging macroeconomic conditions coupled with economic headwinds, Zenith Bank Group achieved a remarkable triple-digit growth of 125% in gross earnings, from N945.6 billion in the previous year to N2.132 trillion in 2023.

This was driven by a 112% YoY growth in interest income and a 141% YoY growth in non-interest income. Customer deposits grew by 69%, reflecting the bank’s market leadership and customers’ trust. Operating expenses grew by 32% YoY. Total assets rose by 66%, largely due to growth in total deposits and the revaluation of foreign currency deposits

On his part the founder and chairman of Zenith Bank Plc, Dr. Jim Ovia,, thanked the outgoing Group Managing Director, Dr Ebenezer Onyeagwu, for his superior performance. And shareholders for their unflinching support and loyalty to the Zenith brand..
